title: Fire over water A blaze driven by strong winds ripped through a tightly packed c...
content:
Fire over water A blaze driven by strong winds ripped through a tightly packed community of stilt homes on the Malaysian portion of Borneo island on April 19. Some 1,000 wooden houses were destroyed and 9,000 residents displaced from the “water village,” an informal settlement built over a bay that serves oil tankers in Sabah state. Authorities said they had no reports of fatalities. THE BULLETIN What we know about the White House’s underground bunker
